description: Milestone 5: Actionable Todos. Users can create, claim, complete, and comment on Todos. Todos belong to an owning organization type (Kreisverband/Landesverband/Bundesverband/Arbeitsgemeinschaft). Deletion is supported but not exposed in the UI (soft/hidden).

userStories.title: Extend Todo domain model with ownership and lifecycle fields
userStories.description: Introduce explicit ownership types and lifecycle/assignment fields for Todos.
acceptanceCriteria: Todo has ownerType enum: Kreisverband, Landesverband, Bundesverband, Arbeitsgemeinschaft
Todo has ownerId/ownerName (string) and fields for status (open/claimed/done) and assignee (optional)
Domain model changes do not leak transport-layer JSON into UI
Context7 consulted for Swift modeling best practices (Codable/Identifiable) where applicable; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Create Todo UI and repository method (POST)
userStories.description: Allow authenticated users to create Todos with required ownership fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Todos tab includes a Create button opening a form (title, description, ownerType, ownerName/ownerId)
Validation ensures required fields and reasonable length limits
TodoRepository includes createTodo(...) API; FakeTodoRepository updated; Real implementation can be stubbed if API write not yet available
Creation success inserts the Todo into list; failure shows clear error
Context7 consulted for SwiftUI form patterns and safe validation; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Claim and complete Todo actions
userStories.description: Enable low-risk participation by claiming and completing Todos.
acceptanceCriteria: Todo detail shows actions based on status: Claim / Mark Done / Unclaim (if applicable)
TodoRepository exposes claimTodo and completeTodo methods (and unclaim if supported)
UI updates state immediately on success; handles failure with revert and message
No deletion control shown in UI
Context7 consulted for state-driven SwiftUI action patterns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Todo comments (lightweight)
userStories.description: Allow adding short comments/updates to a Todo (if backend supports; otherwise keep as local-only stub with clear label).
acceptanceCriteria: Todo detail supports viewing a list of comments and adding a comment
TodoRepository includes addComment(todoId, text) method; fake implementation works end-to-end
Comment content is not logged; identifiers scrubbed
Context7 consulted for list + input composition patterns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Implement Todo deletion capability but keep it hidden from UI
userStories.description: Deletion is supported at repository level for admins/maintenance but not shown in the view.
acceptanceCriteria: TodoRepository includes deleteTodo(todoId) method
No UI element exposes delete; deletion may be callable via debug-only path or internal admin flag that defaults off
Deletion behavior documented in Docs/DECISIONS.md (why hidden)
Context7 consulted for safe feature-flag patterns; summary added to progress.txt
